message:
feat(ars): add dynamic YAML compilation & injection (ft-tkpgy.3.3)

ArsCompiler builds WorkflowDescriptors from generalized command
templates, timeout decisions, and evidence digests. Auto-injects
pre-action snapshot logs, post-action WaitFor verification, and
evidence audit trail. Operator override gate, safety regex validation
on bindings, timeout clamping. 59 inline + 21 proptest = 80 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
